ddls:
CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the template was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the template was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the template belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the template (e.g., Draft, Approved, Published) */,
  "branding_compliance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template meets branding guidelines */,
  "regulatory_compliance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template meets regulatory requirements */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the template based on user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slides" (
  "slide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slide */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the slide belongs to */,
  "slide_no" TEXT /* Slide number within the template */,
  "slide_title" TEXT /* Title of the slide */,
  "slide_content" TEXT /* Content of the slide (e.g., text, images) */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Text, Image, Chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slides_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "slide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the slide the shape belongs to */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "shape_type" TEXT /* Type of the shape (e.g., image, text box) */,
  "shape_order" INTEGER /* Order of the shape on the slide */,
  "template_value" TEXT /* Template value (placeholder) for the shape */,
  "replace_value" TEXT /* Replace value for the shape */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Font size of the text (if applicable) */,
  "font_color" TEXT /* Font color of the text (if applicable) */,
  "font_style" TEXT /* Font style of the text (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_slide_id FOREIGN KEY ("slide_id") REFERENCES slides ("slide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval event */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the template */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the template was approved */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "approval_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_approvals_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_approvals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the template */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the template was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_access_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "resolved_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_comments_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, delete, modify) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_version" INTEGER /* Version of the template after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_history_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., Topic, Department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_tags_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a collaborator */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., editor, reviewer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_collaborators_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., usage, performance) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the asset is associated with */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., image, file) */,
  "asset_path" TEXT /* File path to the asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "asset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the asset in bytes */,
  "asset_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_assets_asset_owner FOREIGN KEY ("asset_owner") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_assets_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_customizations" (
  "customization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customization */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the customization */,
  "customization_date" TEXT /* Date the customization was made */,
  "customization_details" TEXT /* Details of the customization */,
  "customization_type" TEXT /* Type of customization (e.g., Content Update, Design Change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_customizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_customizations_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)
